# SphereMesh

<a id="class-spheremesh-property-height"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **height** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-spheremesh-property-height)

---

<a id="class-spheremesh-property-is-hemisphere"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_hemisphere** = `false` [🔗](#class-spheremesh-property-is-hemisphere)

-  **set_is_hemisphere**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_is_hemisphere**()

If `true`, a hemisphere is created rather than a full sphere.

**Note:** To get a regular hemisphere, the height and radius of the sphere must be equal.

---

<a id="class-spheremesh-property-radial-segments"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **radial_segments** = `64` [🔗](#class-spheremesh-property-radial-segments)

-  **set_radial_segments**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_radial_segments**()

Number of radial segments on the sphere.

---

---

<a id="class-spheremesh-property-rings"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **rings** = `32` [🔗](#class-spheremesh-property-rings)
